race.comment: HOROLOGIST (3) missed the kick then came from near the tail of the field to be beaten under a length on debut last start over 1250m at this track. Has a nice turn of foot and with better barrier manners today can go one better. Stablemate SANCTUM (4) finished his race off nicely to beat all but the highly promising Omolong when on debut over 1100m at Warwick Farm a fortnight ago. Will relish the slightly longer trip today and is a great chance to open the account. ELIO (7) has been about the mark at both runs this time in work, the latest over 1250m here when he tired in the dying stages. Cherry ripe and should be prominent for a long way. SNITZEL A'LA ROUGE (13) hasn't been far away in his two runs to date. Will sit back in the small field and is in the mix again. SHORT SEA (5) has been kept fresh since a satisfactory effort on debut at the Kensington track four weeks ago. Will go forward and play a key role again.
